scripts.generate: node ./scripts/fetch-openapi.mjs && node ./scripts/generate-openapi-types.mjs && node ./scripts/generate-doc-type-files.mjs && biome format --write openapi/umbraco-delivery.openapi.json src/generated/umbraco-openapi.generated.ts src/generated/all-doc-types.generated.ts src/generated/public-doc-types.generated.ts
